name: ytdl-rmcp
description: Download audio/video with yt-dlp (Rust binary), embed metadata + cover art, organize by artist, and transfer to local, SSH, or rclone targets.

target_path.title: Target path
target_path.description: Destination for audio downloads. Use /path for local, host:/path or ssh:host:/path for SSH, and remote:path or rclone:remote:path for rclone.

video_target_path.title: Video target path
video_target_path.description: Destination for video downloads. Same forms as target path. Falls back to the target path if blank.

remote.title: Deprecated SSH remote
remote.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy SSH remote alias or user@host; combines with audio/video destination paths. Prefer target path.

audio_dest_path.title: Deprecated audio SSH path
audio_dest_path.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy absolute SSH path for audio downloads. Prefer target path.

video_dest_path.title: Deprecated video SSH path
video_dest_path.description: Deprecated compatibility alias. Legacy absolute SSH path for video downloads. Prefer video target path.

audio_format.title: Default audio codec
audio_format.description: Default codec when downloading audio: mp3, m4a, opus, flac, wav, or best.

ssh_opts.title: Extra SSH options
ssh_opts.description: Additional ssh options parsed with shell-word syntax, e.g. -i "~/.ssh/ytdl key" -o ProxyJump=media-bastion. Appended after -o BatchMode=yes. Malformed quoting is rejected. Optional.

staging_dir.title: Local staging dir
staging_dir.description: Local directory to stage downloads before transfer. Defaults to system temp.

archive_dir.title: Download archive dir
archive_dir.description: Where the use_archive download history lives. Defaults to the per-user state dir, usually ~/.local/state/ytdl-rmcp.

history_path.title: Download ledger path
history_path.description: JSONL file where completed download calls are logged for youtube_stats. Defaults to downloads.jsonl in the per-user state dir.

plex_url.title: Plex server URL
plex_url.description: Optional Plex server base URL, e.g. http://plex.local:32400, used to add downloaded audio tracks to a Plex playlist.

plex_token.title: Plex token
plex_token.description: Optional Plex auth token for playlist/search API calls.

plex_playlist.title: Plex playlist
plex_playlist.description: Default Plex playlist title or ID to add downloaded audio tracks to. Can be overridden per youtube_download call.

clean_metadata.title: Clean title metadata
clean_metadata.description: Strip common YouTube title noise such as '(Official Video)', '[Official Audio]', trailing channel handles, and extra whitespace before embedding metadata.

acoustid_client_key.title: AcoustID client key
acoustid_client_key.description: Application API key for AcoustID lookups used by youtube_identify. Optional unless using identify.

fpcalc_path.title: fpcalc path
fpcalc_path.description: Optional path to the Chromaprint fpcalc executable. If blank, youtube_identify searches PATH.

musicbrainz_contact.title: MusicBrainz contact
musicbrainz_contact.description: Contact URL or email included in the User-Agent for metadata lookup requests.

auto_update.title: Auto-update yt-dlp
auto_update.description: Update yt-dlp at server startup when stale. Recommended on — each session relaunch self-heals against extractor breakage.

max_age_days.title: Staleness threshold (days)
max_age_days.description: Update yt-dlp when the installed version is older than this many days.

update_pre.title: Track nightly channel
update_pre.description: Update from yt-dlp's nightly pre-release channel instead of stable.

extractor_args.title: yt-dlp extractor args
extractor_args.description: Passed to yt-dlp's --extractor-args. The Android YouTube client keeps search/probe working for official music videos that reject yt-dlp's default clients.

ytdlp_path.title: yt-dlp path
ytdlp_path.description: Use a specific yt-dlp executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

ffmpeg_path.title: ffmpeg path
ffmpeg_path.description: Use a specific ffmpeg executable instead of auto-resolution/auto-download. Optional.

ytdlp_timeout_secs.title: yt-dlp timeout (seconds)
ytdlp_timeout_secs.description: Maximum runtime for each yt-dlp probe/download command.

transfer_timeout_secs.title: Transfer timeout (seconds)
transfer_timeout_secs.description: Maximum runtime budget for each transfer phase.

ytdlp_sha256.title: yt-dlp SHA-256 pin
ytdlp_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved yt-dlp executable.

ffmpeg_sha256.title: ffmpeg SHA-256 pin
ffmpeg_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 digest required for the resolved ffmpeg executable.

allow_local_targets.title: Allow local targets
allow_local_targets.description: Permit /path local filesystem destinations. Keep disabled unless you trust MCP callers to choose local write locations.
